name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State definitions *)
Thinking == 0
Hungry == 1
Eating == 2

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]  (* 0 means fork is free *)
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> Thinking]

(* Next state *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = Thinking
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = Hungry]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = Hungry
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = Eating]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = Eating
          /\ forks[Left(i)] = i
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = i
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = Thinking]

(* Invariant: No two philosophers share a fork *)
TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in 0..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] \in 1..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = forks[Left(i)] \/ forks[i] = forks[Right(i)] \/ forks[i] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ Len(q) = 0
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1

Producer == /\ Len(q) < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ Len(q) > 0
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

generated_spec:

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLE token

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS
VARIABLES ackedChunks, channel, chunks, file, receiverState, retransmitCount, sentChunks


(* Helper definitions *)
ChunkSize == CHUNK_SIZE
FileSize == FILE_SIZE
MaxRetries == MAX_RETRIES

(* Define the initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>  (* file is initially empty *)
    /\ chunks = <<>>  (* no chunks to send yet *)
    /\ sentChunks = {}  (* no chunks have been sent *)
    /\ ackedChunks = {}  (* no chunks have been acknowledged *)
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..FileSize |-> 0]  (* no retransmissions yet *)
    /\ channel = {}  (* channel is empty *)
    /\ receiverState = [i \in 1..FileSize |-> 0]  (* receiver has not received any chunks *)

(* Define the next-state relation *)
Next ==
    (* Action: Sender sends a new chunk *)
    \/ /\ \E i \in 1..FileSize : ~(i \in sentChunks)
        /\ chunks' = Append(chunks, SubSeq(file, i, i + ChunkSize - 1))
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
        /\ channel' = channel \cup {i}
        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = [j \in 1..FileSize |-> IF j = i THEN 1 ELSE retransmitCount[j]]
        /\ receiverState' = receiverState
    (* Action: Receiver acknowledges a chunk *)
    \/ /\ \E i \in sentChunks : ~(i \in ackedChunks)
        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
        /\ channel' = channel \cup {i}
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ receiverState' = [j \in 1..FileSize |-> IF j = i THEN 1 ELSE receiverState[j]]
    (* Action: Sender retransmits a chunk *)
    \/ /\ \E i \in sentChunks : ~(i \in ackedChunks)
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MaxRetries
        /\ channel' = channel \cup {i}
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = [j \in 1..FileSize |-> IF j = i THEN retransmitCount[j] + 1 ELSE retransmitCount[j]]
        /\ receiverState' = receiverState
    (* Action: Receiver receives a chunk *)
    \/ /\ \E i \in channel : i \in sentChunks
        /\ receiverState' = [j \in 1..FileSize |-> IF j = i THEN 1 ELSE receiverState[j]]
        /\ channel' = channel \ {i}
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    (* Action: Receiver acknowledges a chunk *)
    \/ /\ \E i \in channel : i \in ackedChunks
        /\ channel' = channel \ {i}
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ receiverState' = receiverState

(* Define the specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, channel, receiverState>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0, 1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = 0 THEN 1 ELSE wants[i]]
        \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0, 1} |-> IF i = 1 THEN 1 ELSE wants[i]]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {0, 1}^2

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
Next == /\ \E n \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  (* No other changes *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
